title: 论文索引：张书豪老师论文列表与PDF下载链接
content:
主题：张书豪老师论文索引与下载
适用问题：
- 老师的论文在哪里可以下载？
- 能给我某篇论文的链接吗？
- 老师发表过哪些论文？
- SAGE/Neuromem/FlowRAG/MorphStream 论文的PDF在哪里？

老师个人主页：https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io
论文完整列表页：https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/#publications

=== 代表性论文（按研究主线）===

一、State-Centric Runtime Design（共享状态在并发执行下的组织、访问与治理）

1. SAGE (ICML 2026): SAGE: A Dataflow-Native Framework for Modular, Controllable, and Transparent LLM-Augmented Reasoning
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_sage_icml_2026.pdf

2. Neuromem (ICML 2026): Neuromem: A Granular Decomposition of the Streaming Lifecycle in External Memory for LLMs
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_neuromem_icml_2026.pdf

3. Scalable Transactional Stream Processing (TKDE 2025)
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2025/2025_morphstream_tkde.pdf

4. MorphStream (SIGMOD 2023): Adaptive Scheduling for Scalable Transactional Stream Processing on Multicores
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2023/2023_morphstream_sigmod_2023.pdf

5. TSP Survey (VLDBJ 2024): A Survey on Transactional Stream Processing
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2023/2023_vldbj_tsp_survey.pdf

6. TStream (ICDE 2020): Towards Concurrent Stateful Stream Processing on Multicore Processors
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2020/2020_tstream.pdf

7. GRACE (ICDE 2026): Alleviating Reconstruction Cost in Dynamic Graph Processing Systems
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_grace_icde_2026.pdf

8. CANDOR-Bench (SIGMOD 2026): Benchmarking In-Memory Continuous ANNS under Dynamic Open-World Streams
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_candor_bench_sigmod_2026.pdf

二、Hardware-Conscious Execution（异构与受限硬件上的协同优化）

1. LibAMM (NeurIPS 2024): Empirical Insights into Approximate Computing for Accelerating Matrix Multiplication
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2024/2024_libamm_neurips_2024.pdf

2. PECJ (SIGMOD 2024): Stream Window Join on Disorder Data Streams with Proactive Error Compensation
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2024/2024_pecj_sigmod_2024.pdf

3. CStream (TKDE 2024): Parallel Data Stream Compression on Multicore Edge Devices
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2024/2024_cstream_tkde_2024.pdf

4. BriskStream (SIGMOD 2019): Scaling Data Stream Processing on Shared-Memory Multicore Architectures
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2019/2019_briskstream.pdf

5. Intra-Window Join (SIGMOD 2021): Parallelizing Intra-Window Join on Multicores
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2021/2021_intra_window_join_sigmod_2021.pdf

6. FineStream (USENIX ATC 2020): Fine-Grained Window-Based Stream Processing on CPU-GPU
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2020/2020_finestream.pdf

7. MAST (SIGMOD 2025): Efficient Analytical Query Processing on Point Cloud Data
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2025/2025_mast_sigmod_2025.pdf

8. OmniDB (VLDB 2013): Towards Portable and Efficient Query Processing on Parallel CPU/GPU
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2013/2013_omnidb_vldb_2013.pdf

三、Adaptive Learning and Stable Evolution（动态场景下的持续写入、稳定保留与跨轮复用）

1. FlowRAG (WWW 2026): Continual Learning for Dynamic Retriever in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_flowrag_www_2026.pdf

2. StreamFP (WWW 2026): Fingerprint-guided Data Selection for Efficient Stream Learning
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2026/2026_streamfp_www_2026.pdf

3. MOStream (ICDM 2024): A Modular and Self-Optimizing Data Stream Clustering Algorithm
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2024/2024_mostream_icdm_2024.pdf

4. SentiStream (EMNLP 2023): A Co-Training Framework for Adaptive Online Sentiment Analysis
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2023/2023_sentistream_emnlp_2023.pdf

5. Ferret (CVPR 2025): An Efficient Online Continual Learning Framework
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2025/2025_ferret_cvpr_2025.pdf

6. Detecting Hallucination (IJCAI 2025): Deep Internal Representation Analysis for LLM Hallucination
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2025/2025_detecting_hallucination_ijcai_2025.pdf

7. FusionFlow (ACL 2026): Enabling Deep Structural Exploration for Automated Agentic Workflow Generation

8. KELDaR (EMNLP 2024 Findings): Knowledge Graph-Enhanced LLM Based on Question Decomposition
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2024/2024_keldar_emnlp_findings_2024.pdf

9. Global Planning KG-LLM (TKDE 2025): Knowledge Graph-Enhanced LLM Based on Global Planning
   PDF: https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/2025/2025_global_planning_kg_llm_tkde_2025.pdf

=== 回答策略 ===
当有人问起论文时：
1. 先确认具体是哪篇论文（通过关键词、会议名、或主题匹配）
2. 给出论文标题、会议/期刊名、年份
3. 附上PDF直接下载链接（https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/contents/research_papers/...）
4. 如果论文不在上述列表中，引导访问完整列表页：https://shuhaozhangtony.github.io/#publications
5. 如果对方对研究方向感兴趣，简要说明三条主线：State-Centric Runtime Design、Hardware-Conscious Execution、Adaptive Learning and Stable Evolution
